item.title: Rainy Day Farm Vibes
item.description: Experience the calm and productivity of a rainy day on the farm, highlighting daily farming tasks, cozy atmosphere, and the beauty of working in wet weather.

media:content.media:title: Rainy Day Farm Vibes
media:content.media:description: Experience the calm and productivity of a rainy day on the farm, highlighting daily farming tasks, cozy atmosphere, and the beauty of working in wet weather.

item.title: Big Equipment for Corn & Soybean Harvest
item.description: See large farming equipment in action during corn and soybean harvest, showcasing efficiency, machinery techniques, and the scale of modern agriculture.

media:content.media:title: Big Equipment for Corn & Soybean Harvest
media:content.media:description: See large farming equipment in action during corn and soybean harvest, showcasing efficiency, machinery techniques, and the scale of modern agriculture.

item.title: Adapting to Delivery Setbacks
item.description: Learn how farmers adjust and adapt when delivery challenges arise, highlighting problem-solving, planning, and maintaining efficiency on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Adapting to Delivery Setbacks
media:content.media:description: Learn how farmers adjust and adapt when delivery challenges arise, highlighting problem-solving, planning, and maintaining efficiency on the farm.

item.title: Abandoned Farmstead Under an Endless Sky
item.description: Explore an abandoned farmstead set beneath a vast sky, capturing the haunting beauty, rustic structures, and serene atmosphere of a forgotten rural landscape.

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Farmstead Under an Endless Sky
media:content.media:description: Explore an abandoned farmstead set beneath a vast sky, capturing the haunting beauty, rustic structures, and serene atmosphere of a forgotten rural landscape.

item.title: A Look at Grain Systems
item.description: Explore grain systems on the farm, showcasing how crops are stored, moved, and managed efficiently to maintain quality and support large-scale agricultural operations.

media:content.media:title: A Look at Grain Systems
media:content.media:description: Explore grain systems on the farm, showcasing how crops are stored, moved, and managed efficiently to maintain quality and support large-scale agricultural operations.

item.title: Mounting Tanks for Harvest Efficiency
item.description: See how mounting tanks can improve harvest efficiency, highlighting setup techniques, equipment benefits, and ways to streamline farming operations for better productivity.

media:content.media:title: Mounting Tanks for Harvest Efficiency
media:content.media:description: See how mounting tanks can improve harvest efficiency, highlighting setup techniques, equipment benefits, and ways to streamline farming operations for better productivity.

item.title: Grain Tank: A Harvest Essential
item.description: Discover why a grain tank is crucial during harvest, showcasing its role in storage, efficiency, and maintaining crop quality on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Grain Tank: A Harvest Essential
media:content.media:description: Discover why a grain tank is crucial during harvest, showcasing its role in storage, efficiency, and maintaining crop quality on the farm.

item.title: Planting a Large Sweet Corn Field
item.description: Watch the process of planting a vast sweet corn field, highlighting planting techniques, equipment use, and strategies for a successful and productive crop.

media:content.media:title: Planting a Large Sweet Corn Field
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of planting a vast sweet corn field, highlighting planting techniques, equipment use, and strategies for a successful and productive crop.

item.title: Grain Cart Check
item.description: See a detailed grain cart inspection, highlighting maintenance, setup, and tips to ensure efficient and reliable operation during harvest season.

media:content.media:title: Grain Cart Check
media:content.media:description: See a detailed grain cart inspection, highlighting maintenance, setup, and tips to ensure efficient and reliable operation during harvest season.

item.title: Saying Goodbye to a Farm Favorite
item.description: A heartfelt farewell to a beloved part of the farm, highlighting memories, impact on daily life, and the significance of cherished farm animals or equipment.

media:content.media:title: Saying Goodbye to a Farm Favorite
media:content.media:description: A heartfelt farewell to a beloved part of the farm, highlighting memories, impact on daily life, and the significance of cherished farm animals or equipment.

item.title: A Smooth-Running Farm Machine
item.description: See farm machinery operating efficiently, showcasing maintenance, precision, and techniques that keep equipment performing smoothly during daily farming tasks.

media:content.media:title: A Smooth-Running Farm Machine
media:content.media:description: See farm machinery operating efficiently, showcasing maintenance, precision, and techniques that keep equipment performing smoothly during daily farming tasks.
